---
type: decision
title: Set revised hiring bar for senior engineers
created: '2026-03-10T14:00:00'
modified: '2026-03-10T15:00:00'
options:
  - Current bar (5 interviews)
  - Streamlined bar (3 interviews + take-home)
  - Portfolio review only
chosen: Streamlined bar (3 interviews + take-home)
confidence: medium
reversible: true
---
Current process takes too long and we're losing candidates. Streamlined process with take-home project.
